channel.title: C Kalansuriya & Sons
channel.description: Recent content on C Kalansuriya & Sons

item.title: Prima Wheat Flour Shop
item.description: C Kalansuriya & Sons is the most prominent outlet in Galle city to purchase Prima Wheat Flour. As a key distributor partner of Prima Ceylon Ltd, we bring you the whole range of Prima wheat flour for any of your wheat flour requirements. We serve both individual consumers through our retail location on Dangedara Street, Galle City, and fulfill the bulk requirements of bakeries and shops across the wider Galle area.
